hero.label: Software Studio
hero.title: Code that
hero.subtitle: We build custom digital solutions with clean architecture, exceptional performance, and design that converts.

services.label: What we do
services.title: Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end digital solutions crafted for performance, scalability, and lasting impact.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Custom web applications built with modern frameworks and clean architecture that scale with your business.
items.longDescription: We design and build high-performance web applications from scratch. Our approach combines cutting-edge technology with clean, maintainable architecture. Whether you need a landing page, a complex SaaS platform, or anything in between, we deliver solutions that are fast, accessible, and built to last. Every line of code is written with scalability and long-term maintainability in mind.
highlights: Custom architecture tailored to your needs
Performance scores above 90 on all Core Web Vitals

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.description: Robust server-side systems, databases, and integrations designed for reliability and high throughput.
items.longDescription: We build the backbone of your application — reliable, secure, and scalable server-side systems. From simple REST APIs to complex distributed architectures, we design solutions that handle real-world load and integrate seamlessly with third-party services. Our backends are documented, monitored, and built with failure in mind so your product stays online.
highlights: Designed for high availability and zero downtime
Full API documentation with OpenAPI / Swagger
Rate limiting, caching, and security hardening

items.title: Cloud & DevOps
items.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and cloud infrastructure to ship faster with confidence.
items.longDescription: We set up the infrastructure that lets your team move fast and deploy safely. Automated pipelines, container orchestration, and cloud-native architecture mean fewer fire drills and more time building features. We make cloud infrastructure approachable and manageable, no matter the size of your team.
highlights: Full observability: logs, metrics, and alerts

items.title: Security & Compliance
items.description: Code reviews, penetration testing, and best practices to keep your systems and data protected.
items.longDescription: Security is not an afterthought — it's woven into everything we build. We conduct thorough security audits, implement encryption and secure authentication, and help you align with industry standards and compliance requirements. Whether you're preparing for a launch or need a full security review of an existing system, we've got you covered.

items.title: UI / UX Design
items.description: User-centered interfaces with thoughtful design systems that delight and convert.
items.longDescription: Great software deserves great design. We create interfaces that are intuitive, beautiful, and intentional — from initial wireframes to polished design systems. We balance aesthetics with usability, ensuring every interaction feels effortless. Our design process is collaborative, iterative, and always focused on the end user.
highlights: Research-driven UX with real user flows
Scalable design systems and component libraries
Interactive Figma prototypes before a line of code

items.title: Analytics & Optimization
items.description: Data-driven insights and performance tuning to grow and improve your digital product.
items.longDescription: We help you understand how your product is performing and where to improve it. From custom analytics dashboards to SEO audits and A/B testing, we give you the data you need to make confident decisions. We also tune your application's performance so it loads faster, ranks higher, and converts more visitors into customers.
highlights: Custom event tracking and funnel analysis
SEO audit and structured data implementation

technologies.label: Our stack
technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.subtitle: The tools and languages we use to build reliable, scalable digital products.

team.label: The ones doing magic
team.title: The team
team.subtitle: A team of passionate developers, committed to technical excellence and attention to detail.

eduardo.bio: Passionate about frontend and user experience. Specialist in modern interfaces, animations and design that converts.
eduardo.detail: Eduardo leads user interface development with a focus on accessibility, performance and aesthetics. His mastery of React and CSS animations makes him responsible for every pixel having intention. He has built over 12 projects that combine functionality with memorable visual experience.

patricio.bio: Backend systems architect focused on scalability, security and high-performance APIs.
patricio.detail: Patricio designs and maintains the backbone of projects. His experience in microservices architecture, relational databases and Docker containers ensures systems that scale painlessly. Passionate about security and good engineering practices.

mario.bio: Fullstack developer with product vision. Leads projects from start to production with solid architecture.
mario.detail: Mario connects the pieces. With comprehensive product vision and fullstack experience, he takes projects from wireframe to AWS deploy. His expertise in Next.js and MongoDB allows him to build complete platforms with SEO, performance and scalability from day one.

contact.subtitle: Tell us your idea. We love working with people who want to build something that matters.
contact.success_msg: We'll get back to you soon.
